Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Continued To Mar-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Establishment Of A Flip Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Continued To Feb-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Order Instructing Trustee, Clairfying Certain Trust Provisions, And Modifying Trust To Include A Flip Special Needs Trust For A Trust Beneficiary
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emile Calhoun for David Cafiso (Trustee).

Ms. Calhoun stated that she presented a revised order to Mr. Bassin, which he approved as to form regarding the petition for instructions only. Mr. Bassin has filed opposition to the establishment of the special needs trust, which Ms. Calhoun requested a 2 month continuance to resolve that issue. Ms. Calhoun cited the authority for the 7% interest. The Court continued the special needs trust issue to February 6, 2008. The Court reviewed the Order before signing it.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Julia Capozzoli.

Petition For Determination Under Probate Code Section 21320 That Proposed Filing Of Prob. 17200 Petition Would Not Violate No Contest Clause Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Emile Calhoun appearing for trustee David Cafiso. Court is prepared to grant the order as requested. Counsel stated that Susan Cafiso is the same as Susan H Peters. Order signed in open court.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR# 11055. Bailiff: O. Arias.
